title: International Registered Students
content:
International Registered Students

Internet Access

Okan Homepage

Useful Information

Internet Access

MENU

You can have internet access with your user accounts through the computers found in libraries in addition to the computer labs of the Faculties on the campus.

You are assigned e-mail accounts for use during their studentship at our University. With this account, you can access all Okan University systems (OIS, Wi-Fi, lab sessions, etc.).

You can reset passwords, and make the connection settings of your computers, telephones, tablets, and such devices by means of the kiosks installed at certain location on all our campuses.

Uninterrupted cable and wireless internet connection is provided within the campus area (including open areas) and dormitories. You can have internet access via the STUDENT network with your user names and passwords.
